signals.npcLine: Crypto streets whisper: RAVE's pulse flat, watch the deadbeats.
signals.questPulse: Track dormant token RAVE, find the fading signal node.
signals.worldFeed: Market haze thickens; RAVE barely stirs amid shifting layers.
signals.clueEvent: Silent RAVE terminals detected in abandoned data hubs.

signals.npcLine: PENGU's fleeting glow draws spec hunters into shadow runs.
signals.questPulse: Trace PENGU trail before it vanishes in fear fog.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment dips low; PENGU's attractors flicker under pressure.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted logs show PENGU volume spikes in black market.

signals.npcLine: ASTEROID climbing fast, a rogue star breaking through fear’s grip.
signals.questPulse: Hack into ASTEROID exchanges; decode sudden volume bursts.
signals.worldFeed: Networks buzz with ASTEROID’s unsteady signal corridor.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual ASTEROID transactions suggest strategic play in shadows.

signals.npcLine: ORDI’s slow creep unsettles data miners in fading zones.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate ORDIs behind the smog, secure cryptic info caches.
signals.worldFeed: ORDI edges up in the gloom, stirring nervous watchers.
signals.clueEvent: ORDI trace left in ghost market communications.

signals.npcLine: AAVE’s whispers of stability cut through fear-choked networks.
signals.questPulse: Extract AAVE’s anchor data - a key to calm in chaos.
signals.worldFeed: AAVE remains steady, a beacon in the volatile night.
signals.clueEvent: AAVE-linked safehouses encrypted under deep market watch.
